session_archive._note: When true, the full transcript at SessionEnd is copied alongside the chunks so retrieval can link to the source. When false, only chunk bodies are retained.

embedder._note: Embedder backends (ollama, fastembed, remote) are deferred to a follow-up. The current 'none' value indexes chunks without vectors; retrieval is also deferred.

retrieval._note: UserPromptSubmit retrieval and surfacer are deferred to a follow-up commit; the hook currently no-ops.
